calendar.matters:
DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
Off Calendar Sep-20-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RESPONDENT RESIDENTIAL RENT STABILIZATION AND ARBITRATION'S DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION.

Appearances: Wayne K. Snodgrass of the Office of the City Attorney (415.554.4675) for respondent and moving party; No other appearances.

This matter is not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: SUSTAINED without leave to amend. Order signed. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/REQ)

DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
Off Calendar Aug-24-2017 Continued To Sep-20-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: RESPONDENT RESIDENTIAL RENT STABILIZATION AND ARBITRATION'S DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION

No appearances. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Continued to September 20, 2017 per stipulation. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/REQ)

DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
Off Calendar Aug-08-2017 Continued To Aug-24-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

RESPONDENT RESIDENTIAL RENT STABILIZATION AND ARBITRATION's DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION is Continued to August 24, 2017. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of opposition to department 501 no later than August 11, 2017 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not reported (D501)

Notice Of Motion For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar May-09-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER BARBARA FEDUN's Motion For Writ Of Mandate is OFF CALENDAR due to improper service and notice, and failure to obtain the record of proceedings. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported (D501)
